fields.name: requestId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this dispute chargeback request, assigned by the originating system

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the request was created and submitted

fields.name: department
fields.description: The originating department that submitted the dispute request

fields.name: targetDepartment
fields.description: The receiving department responsible for processing the dispute

fields.name: customerDetails
fields.description: Core identifying and contact information for the customer initiating the dispute

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer within the bank

children.name: customerName
children.description: Full name of the customer as registered on the account

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: IBAN of the customer's account from which the disputed transaction originated

children.name: email
children.description: Customer's email address for dispute correspondence

children.name: phone
children.description: Customer's phone number for dispute correspondence

fields.name: transactionDetails
fields.description: Complete details of the transaction being disputed

children.name: transactionId
children.description: Unique identifier for the disputed transaction

children.name: transactionDate
children.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the disputed transaction occurred

children.name: amount
children.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the transaction

children.name: merchant
children.description: Name of the merchant or business that processed the transaction

children.name: merchantReference
children.description: Merchant's reference code or identifier for the transaction

children.name: description
children.description: Narrative description of the goods or services purchased

fields.name: disputeDetails
fields.description: Dispute classification, reason, and current processing status

children.name: disputeType
children.description: Classification of the dispute type

children.name: reason
children.description: Standardized reason code for the dispute

children.name: reasonDescription
children.description: Free-text explanation of the dispute reason provided by the customer

children.name: disputeStatus
children.description: Current processing status of the dispute

children.name: createdDate
children.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dispute was initially created

fields.name: evidenceProvided
fields.description: Collection of supporting documents or evidence submitted with the dispute

children.name: type
children.description: Classification of the evidence document type

children.name: description
children.description: Narrative description of the evidence content

children.name: documentId
children.description: Unique identifier for the evidence document

fields.name: requestStatus
fields.description: Current status of the request submission to the accounts department

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Processing priority level assigned to this dispute request

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes providing additional context or special handling instructions

fields.name: requiredActions
fields.description: List of action items that must be completed to resolve the dispute

children.name: action
children.description: Specific action to be performed during dispute resolution
